text:
The GitHub profile at `https://github.com/Howuhh` is confirmed to belong to 
Alexander Nikulin, who maintains the "Single-file SAC-N implementation on jax with flax and equinox."
 The automated checker flagged "Howuhh" vs. "Alexander Nikulin," but 
"Howuhh" is simply Alexander Nikulin's GitHub handle — he is a PhD student studying Offline Reinforcement Learning and a Senior Research Scientist at AIRI.
 This is a minor metadata discrepancy (GitHub username vs. real name), not a hallucination.

EXPLANATION: The GitHub repository at https://github.com/Howuhh/sac-n-jax is real and belongs to Alexander Nikulin, whose GitHub handle is "Howuhh." The author mismatch flagged by the checker is simply the difference between his GitHub username and his real name.
LINK: https://github.com/Howuhh/sac-n-jax
FOUND_TITLE: sac-n-jax: Single-file SAC-N implementation in jax
FOUND_AUTHORS: Alexander Nikulin (Howuhh)
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
